name: SparkLane
description: SparkLane is a small growth studio that helps early-stage consumer startups launch faster with paid social, creator campaigns, email funnels, and lightweight creative production.

name: RelayIQ
description: RelayIQ builds workflow software for student services teams, with a focus on better onboarding, clearer dashboards, and faster response loops for campus support staff.

name: LedgerLoop
description: LedgerLoop is an early-stage finance operations platform for small businesses that want cleaner forecasting, better pipeline visibility, and simpler reporting without a full finance team.

name: Verdant Grid
description: Verdant Grid helps SMEs understand emissions data, prepare lightweight sustainability reports, and organize climate-related operational work without heavy consulting overhead.

name: Canvas Pilot
description: Canvas Pilot is a product and presentation design studio that supports startup teams with pitch decks, UX polish, rapid user testing, and practical design system work.
